Name: ItemLotParam2_Chr
Description: Defines parameters related to item lots.

Fields.Name: Lots Dropped Order
Fields.Description: Determines the order lots are granted.

Fields.Name: Lots Dropped
Fields.Description: Number of lots this itemLot will provide.

Fields.Name: [0] Chance
Fields.Description:
The base percentage for this item.
Each base percentage is added together, the result is the overall chance for an item to drop for the itemlot.
Then during a second roll, the individual percentages are used to determine which item to drop.
